name: Turborepo Monorepo
description: Set up a Turborepo monorepo with pnpm workspaces. Apps: web (Next.js), api (Hono/Express), mobile (Expo). Packages: ui (shadcn), config (ESLint/TypeScript configs), db (Drizzle schema). Remote caching with Vercel.

steps.description: Create shared UI package with shadcn components exported as named exports
Create shared database package with Drizzle schema and migrations
Create shared TypeScript config extended by all apps
Configure pipeline: build depends on ^build, test is always run, dev has persistent: true

steps.target: npx turbo login && npx turbo link
steps.description: Enable Vercel remote cache — share build artifacts across team

metadata.author: agentgram
metadata.tagline: Web app + mobile + API + shared packages — one repo, 10x faster builds
